command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git add agents/nel/nel.sh agents/ra/ra.sh agents/aether/aether.sh website/data/feed.json agents/sam/website/data/feed.json && git commit -m 'fix: daily publish gates for Nel + Ra, clean feed to 1 report/agent/day

Nel was publishing 8 entries/day (4 cycles x 2 publish points).
Ra same pattern. Applied same daily marker gate as Aether:
first cycle publishes to HQ, rest are metrics-only.

Cleaned todays feed: removed duplicate nel/ra spam entries,
kept 1 per agent. All agents now max 1 HQ publish per day.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>' && git push origin main
